description: Product Description Wisdom Xtra Clean fluoride toothpaste has been formulated to help give all round protection for a healthy smile, contains the optimum amount of fluoride to help provide protection from sugar acids, strengthen teeth, fight cavities and decay. Helps give all round protection for a healthy smile, truly freshens breath by getting to odour-causing bacteria, one of the causes of bad breath. As a result, breath stays fresh for hours. It also restores the natural whiteness of your teeth. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush, brush in circular motions for two minutes, and rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
